languages.text: На мостике династического флагмана фон Валанциус произошел ожесточенный спор Вольного Торговца и {mf|его|ее} прославленного предка. Напряжение между членами династии возросло, и в ближайшем будущем Себериан намеревается окончательно выяснить отношения со своим потомком.

The bridge of the von Valancius flagship has witnessed a conflict between the Rogue Trader and {mf|his|her} illustrious ancestor. The tensions between the two members of the dynasty have risen, and Seberian fully intends to settle this matter in the near future.
languages.original_text: На мостике династического флагмана фон Валанциус произошел ожесточенный спор Вольного Торговца и {mf|его|ее} прославленного предка. Напряжение между членами династии возросло, и в ближайшем будущем Себериан намеревается окончательно выяснить отношения со своим потомком.

languages.text: フォン・ヴァランシウス家の旗艦の艦橋は、ローグトレーダーとその名高い祖先との対立を目撃した。この両者の緊張は高まり、セベリアンは近い将来この問題を解決するつもりだ。
languages.original_text: The bridge of the von Valancius flagship has witnessed a conflict between the Rogue Trader and {mf|his|her} illustrious ancestor. The tensions between the two members of the dynasty have risen, and Seberian fully intends to settle this matter in the near future.

traits.locale_text: フォン・ヴァランシウス家の旗艦の艦橋は、ローグトレーダーとその名高い祖先との対立を目撃した。この両者の緊張は高まり、セベリアンは近い将来この問題を解決するつもりだ。

languages.text: 冯·瓦兰修斯旗舰的舰桥见证了行商浪人与其显赫先祖之间的冲突。王朝两位成员之间剑拔弩张，而塞贝里安一心打算在近期彻底了结此事。
languages.original_text: The bridge of the von Valancius flagship has witnessed a conflict between the Rogue Trader and {mf|his|her} illustrious ancestor. The tensions between the two members of the dynasty have risen, and Seberian fully intends to settle this matter in the near future.

traits.locale_text: 冯·瓦兰修斯旗舰的舰桥见证了行商浪人与其显赫先祖之间的冲突。王朝两位成员之间剑拔弩张，而塞贝里安一心打算在近期彻底了结此事。

languages.text: Von Valancius sancak gemisinin köprüsü, Hür Tacir ile onun şanlı atası arasında çatışmaya tanık oldu. Hanedanlığın iki mensubu arasındaki gerilim arttı. Seberian, bu meseleyi yakın gelecekte halletmekte son derece kararlı.
languages.original_text: The bridge of the von Valancius flagship has witnessed a conflict between the Rogue Trader and {mf|his|her} illustrious ancestor. The tensions between the two members of the dynasty have risen, and Seberian fully intends to settle this matter in the near future.

traits.locale_text: Von Valancius sancak gemisinin köprüsü, Hür Tacir ile onun şanlı atası arasında çatışmaya tanık oldu. Hanedanlığın iki mensubu arasındaki gerilim arttı. Seberian, bu meseleyi yakın gelecekte halletmekte son derece kararlı.

languages.text: El puente de la nave insignia von Valancius ha sido testigo de un conflicto entre {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente y su ilustre antepasado. La tensión entre ambos miembros de la dinastía va en aumento y Seberian tiene intención de resolver la situación pronto.
languages.original_text: The bridge of the von Valancius flagship has witnessed a conflict between the Rogue Trader and {mf|his|her} illustrious ancestor. The tensions between the two members of the dynasty have risen, and Seberian fully intends to settle this matter in the near future.

traits.locale_text: El puente de la nave insignia von Valancius ha sido testigo de un conflicto entre {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente y su ilustre antepasado. La tensión entre ambos miembros de la dinastía va en aumento y Seberian tiene intención de resolver la situación pronto.

languages.text: La passerelle du vaisseau amiral des von Valancius a été témoin d'un conflit entre {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} et son illustre ancêtre. La tension monte entre les deux membres de la dynastie, et Seberian compte bien régler ce différend rapidement.
languages.original_text: The bridge of the von Valancius flagship has witnessed a conflict between the Rogue Trader and {mf|his|her} illustrious ancestor. The tensions between the two members of the dynasty have risen, and Seberian fully intends to settle this matter in the near future.

traits.locale_text: La passerelle du vaisseau amiral des von Valancius a été témoin d'un conflit entre {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} et son illustre ancêtre. La tension monte entre les deux membres de la dynastie, et Seberian compte bien régler ce différend rapidement.

languages.text: Die Brücke des Flaggschiffs derer von Valancius war Zeuge eines Konfliktes {mf|des Freihändlers mit seinem|der Freihändlerin mit ihrem} illustren Ahnherren. Die Spannung zwischen den beiden Mitgliedern der Dynastie haben zugenommen, und Seberian hat vor, die Angelegenheit in naher Zukunft zu regeln.
